title: Dog Bed Mattress Multipurpose Machine Washable Puppy Mat Cushions for Small/Medium/Large Dogs and Cat Cages XZ006 (61 * 41 CM, Coffee)
features: 1.【Comfortable Material Support Deep Sleep】Our dog bed is made of super soft, comfortable and warm high-quality flannel. It can provide a long-term dry environment with good ventilation, no smell and rest for your cat and dog. Make sure your loyal friends get a good night’s sleep every day.
2.【Easy to clean】This dog mattress can be simply machine washed in cold water and then dry or air dry at low water level for your convenience. Helps keep your house free of smell, fur and dander.

3.【Multi Use】Very practical! Our dog crate mattress can be used as cushions, mat towel, blanket and so on for your plush friends. And it can also be placed on the car and on the floor according to your needs. Both sides are made of comfortable fabrics, one side is cute pattern, the other side is pure white.
4.【5 Reasonable Size】Please measure your pet before placing the order. This dog mat is perfect for most small, medium, large dog and cat.
5.【Personalized Design and Hand-Sewn】Cute and lovely dog bed with colorful dots print, adding more fun for your pet! Variety of choices! This product is hand-sewn, with an error of 3-5 CM.
description: Product Description Soft double layer flannel blankets filled with soft plush can let your pets feel warm and comfortable during napping or sleeping. Small size can be used as cushion for the pet carrier, and large size can be blanket or cover for cat and puppy dogs or small animals. Not easy shedding cushions with cute pattern, different sizes to choose for your little friends. Type: double layer and one side with cute pattern blankets Material: environment friendly premium flannel with ultra soft plush inside Usage: blanket / mat / pad / cushion / towel for cats and puppy dogs Soft Blanket About Pet Cushion We always stand behind our products and will offer the best products for you. Premium Fluffy Flannel Cushion Soft and Warm Mat for Cats & Dogs cozy home with loyal family friends Please Choose the Suitable Size for Your Pet Size 1: 49 x 32 cm / 19.3 x 12.6 inches, suitable for pets within 2.5 kg / 5.5 lb Size 2: 61 x 41 cm / 24.0 x 16.1 inches, suitable for pets within 5 kg / 11 lb Size 3: 69 x 52 cm / 27.2 x 20.5 inches, suitable for pets within 10 kg / 22 lb Size XL: 79 x 60 cm / 31.1 x 23.6 inches, suitable for pets within 20 kg / 44 lb Size XL: 89 x 68 cm / 35.0 x 26.8 inches, suitable for pets within 25 kg / 55 lb Soft flannel fleece material Durable and fine stitches Cute pattern Varied and bright colors Filled with soft plush Easy fold and carry
